description: Manifest of personal skills to install. Remote entries (source: remote) are cloned from a repo; local entries (source: local) are vendored in a subdirectory alongside this manifest. The install script prompts before adding each one.

skills.description: Create, edit, and manage diagrams with Draw.io integration. Supports embedding diagrams in artifacts for documentation, planning, and design.

Read-only investigation of a suspected system issue, bug, or unusual behavior in the Gloo Forge platform. Produces an evidence-based diagnostic report — symptom, failing layer, root cause, blast radius, recommended fix — with each distinct issue assigned a stable ID plus an appendix debugging prompt so a later fix-oriented deep dive can target one issue with minimal context. Analysis only, no code changes.

Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes. Drives one issue to a verified root-cause fix and records the session as a <slug>-debug.md artifact under $ARTIFACT_DIR; can be driven by a system-issue-analysis issue ID when one is provided.
Automate browser interactions for local app testing, form filling, screenshots, and UI verification. Use when the user asks to test flows in a browser.
Diagnose and fix failing tests. Use when tests are broken and need root-cause analysis and a targeted fix — not a broad refactor.
Create pull requests by analyzing commits, drafting summaries, and opening PRs with gh. Use when the user asks to create, open, or submit a PR.
Generate and create GitHub pull requests with structured descriptions. Handles branch push, PR creation via gh, ticket linking, and description formatting.
